caption: A young woman with light brown hair styled in a low side ponytail stands barefoot on wet, footprint-dappled beach sand, with foamy rolling ocean waves and a bright pale blue sky in the background. She wears a cropped pale pink hooded long-sleeve top, a navy blue jacket slipped off her shoulders to hang over her arms, and tight black leggings. At the start of the clip, her gaze is fixed directly on the camera, with a soft closed-mouth smile, lips gently curved upward with no teeth visible, and faint smile lines at the corners of her mouth. Her hands are loosely clasped together in front of her lower torso, and her body leans slightly backward. She blinks slowly once, tilting her head a small amount to the side while her soft smile remains. She then gradually turns her head to her right (the viewer's left), shifting her gaze away from the camera to look out at the distant ocean, her expression settling into a calm, relaxed neutral state with her lips still closed and her brow completely smooth. The camera slowly zooms in toward her upper body as the clip progresses, and her hair blows faintly in the light sea breeze throughout.
